fundamentals.name: iShares Silver Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The Trust seeks to reflect such performance before payment of the Trust's expenses and liabilities. It is not actively managed. The Trust does not engage in any activities designed to obtain a profit from, or to ameliorate losses caused by, changes in the price of silver.

news.paragraph: SLV has seen significant price appreciation over the past year, but recent analysis highlights concerns regarding its 0.50% fee and a 28% tax rate, which may diminish investor returns. Comparisons suggest alternative silver ETFs like SIVR might offer better value, and one prediction indicates SLV could see a surge after May 15th. The ETF's position as the largest silver ETF is noted, but its continued dominance as the best way to own silver in 2026 is being questioned.

headlines.title: SLV Is Up 132% in a Year, But Its 0.50% Fee and 28% Tax Rate Tell a Different Story
